MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation's unopposed motion to approve settlement and for entry of consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/SKF)
